languages.original_text: {n}Seberian chuckles grimly.{/n} "Laudable resolve, heir of mine, though unexpected! The wretch must pay!"

languages.text: {n}Себериан мрачно усмехается.{/n} "Похвальная, пускай и неожиданная решимость, наследни{mf|к|ца}! Тварь должна поплатиться!"
{n}Seberian chuckles grimly.{/n} "Laudable resolve, heir of mine, though unexpected! The wretch must pay!"
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан мрачно усмехается.{/n} "Похвальная, пускай и неожиданная решимость, наследни{mf|к|ца}! Тварь должна поплатиться!"

{n}Seberian chuckles grimly.{/n} "Laudable resolve, heir of mine, though unexpected! The wretch must pay!"

languages.text: {n}Seberian se ríe sombríamente.{/n} «¡Una determinación admirable, hereder{mf|o|a} mí{mf|o|a}, aunque inesperada! ¡La escoria debe pagar!».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian chuckles grimly.{/n} "Laudable resolve, heir of mine, though unexpected! The wretch must pay!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian se ríe sombríamente.{/n} «¡Una determinación admirable, hereder{mf|o|a} mí{mf|o|a}, aunque inesperada! ¡La escoria debe pagar!».

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安阴郁地笑了笑。{/n}“值得称道的决心，我的继承人，虽然出乎意料。那个恶棍必须付出代价！”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian chuckles grimly.{/n} "Laudable resolve, heir of mine, though unexpected! The wretch must pay!"

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安阴郁地笑了笑。{/n}“值得称道的决心，我的继承人，虽然出乎意料。那个恶棍必须付出代价！”

languages.text: {n}Seberian pousse un petit rire sinistre.{/n} « Je ne m'attendais pas à une telle détermination de votre part, {mf|héritier|héritière} ! Ce misérable doit payer ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian chuckles grimly.{/n} "Laudable resolve, heir of mine, though unexpected! The wretch must pay!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian pousse un petit rire sinistre.{/n} « Je ne m'attendais pas à une telle détermination de votre part, {mf|héritier|héritière} ! Ce misérable doit payer ! »

languages.text: {n}Seberian acımasızca kıkırdıyor.{/n} "Övgüye değer bir kararlılık sevgili vârisim, hem de beklenmedik! Bu sefil, yaptıklarının bedelini ödemeli!"
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian chuckles grimly.{/n} "Laudable resolve, heir of mine, though unexpected! The wretch must pay!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian acımasızca kıkırdıyor.{/n} "Övgüye değer bir kararlılık sevgili vârisim, hem de beklenmedik! Bu sefil, yaptıklarının bedelini ödemeli!"

languages.text: {n}Seberian lacht grimmig.{/n} "Lobenswerte Entschlossenheit, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}, wenngleich unerwartet! Der Teufel muss bezahlen!"
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian chuckles grimly.{/n} "Laudable resolve, heir of mine, though unexpected! The wretch must pay!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian lacht grimmig.{/n} "Lobenswerte Entschlossenheit, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}, wenngleich unerwartet! Der Teufel muss bezahlen!"

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは不敵に笑う。{/n}「君がそう決意したとは、予想外だが、立派だ。その野郎は罰を受けるに違いない！」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian chuckles grimly.{/n} "Laudable resolve, heir of mine, though unexpected! The wretch must pay!"

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンは不敵に笑う。{/n}「君がそう決意したとは、予想外だが、立派だ。その野郎は罰を受けるに違いない！」
